title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on the occasion of Chaitra Navratri
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on the occasion of Chaitra Navratri

Heartfelt greetings to all countrymen on the sacred festival of Chaitra Navratri
I pray to Maa Bhagwati for everyone’s good health, prosperity, and a life full of splendor

Posted On:
19 MAR 2026 11:15AM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah extended his greetings to the people of the country on the auspicious occasion of Chaitra Navratri.

In a post on X, Shri Amit Shah said, “Jai Mata Di! Heartfelt greetings to all countrymen on the sacred festival of Chaitra Navratri. I pray to Maa Bhagwati for your good health, prosperity, and a life full of splendor.”

जय माता दी!
चैत्र नवरात्रि के पावन पर्व की समस्त देशवासियों को हार्दिक शुभकामनाएँ।
माँ भगवती से आपके उत्तम स्वास्थ्य, समृद्धि और वैभवपूर्ण जीवन की कामना करता हूँ।
pic.twitter.com/i7pqPLWyFm
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
March 19, 2026

***

RK/PR/PS/SC

(Release ID: 2242293)
